form.formComment: Was at big odds at debut, ran last of 8 at Durbanville on March 18 over 1000m, 12 len behind Winter Pirate carrying 60kg at $41. Requires plenty of improvement after a modest debut.

form.formComment: Resumes from a spell after only one run when 9th of 13 at this track on January 13 over 1000m, 6 len behind St Harry carrying 60kg at $15. Can return with a bold run.

form.formComment: Comes off a 46 day let-up. Last start second last of 9 at this track in G3 on February 28 over 1200m, 3.5 len behind Red Spice carrying 59kg at $34. The race before that 2nd of 12 at this track on February 4 over 1000m, 2.75 len behind World Series with 60kg at $17. Leading chance again.
